line.dialogue: In the dark recesses of the mind, a disease known as FEAR feasts upon the souls of those who cannot overcome its power...

line.stage: Finn and Jake chase a Fire Newt to the ocean

line.dialogue: Come back, thief!

line.stage: The Fire Newt spews fire at Finn and Jake

line.dialogue: Whoa!
Stop farting on me! It's gross!
You can't just go around stealing boots.
Yeah, and you know the penalty for stealing boots. It's poots... on newts.

line.stage: The Fire Newt wades into the ocean to avoid Finn and Jake

line.dialogue: He's getting away in that lake!
Dude, that isn't a lake. That's an ocean.

line.stage: Jake stretches and heads towards the ocean, a poot following behind, barking

line.dialogue: Laughs and runs after Jake Bark! Bark! Bark! Bark! ...Huh?

line.stage: The hue of the ocean and sky changes to red and ominous music plays as a wave crashes
Finn backs away from the water as it washes onto land

line.dialogue: Uhh...
Laughing and farting on the Newt Poots on newts! Poots on newts!
No!
Slow-motion Poots on newts!
laughs and starts removing his shoes I'm coming, Jake. I'll poot on that newt as soon as I'm barefoot. Uh...

line.stage: The ocean turns a red hue again and ominous music plays as a wave crashes
Finn gasps and rapidly crawls away from the water

line.dialogue: Breaths heavily, his stomach rumbles Ow! Why is my stomach going nuts?

line.stage: A black smoke rises out of Finn's navel

line.dialogue: Ow!

line.stage: The smoke forms into a face and laughs

line.dialogue: Wh-wh-wh-Who are you?
I am the manifestation of your fear... fear of the ocean!
What? I'm not afraid of lakes, wells, or rivers, streams, or deep wells or puddles. Why would I be afraid of- Screams and backs away from the water
Laughs 'Cause you're a wuss.
I'm no wuss! I'm the hero around these parts!
Ha! You're too scared of the ocean to ever be a true hero.
Not true! I'm not scared of nothin'!

line.stage: Finn charges towards the ocean, screaming, but stops when he sees a wave crash

line.dialogue: Shakes his head and takes a deep breath I shall conquer my fear.
Yeah, right.
No! I will. I'll conquer my fear.
Of course you will, Receding back into Finn's navel and I live in a two bedroom apartment that doesn't smell like vomit Laughs ...Sarcasm.

line.stage: Jake comes onscreen, panting, and shrinks back to normal when he reaches Finn

line.dialogue: Dude. Dude, did you see me? I was all like womp, and then I was all like take this! Womp! Womp! And then... Hey, what’s wrong with you, dude?
Jake. I think I'm afraid... of the ocean.
Say what, now?
I need your help to overcome my fear. Will you do it?
Um... No... I don't really wanna do it.
Jake! Come on!
I'm just messing with you. I'll do it. Hmm... Where to start? Oh, ok. I think we should just take a few steps in the water. You can hold Jake's hand if you're scared.

line.stage: Jake grabs Finn's hand and starts walking towards the water, but Finn doesn't walk and falls over

line.dialogue: Um... Oh it's ok, dude. I see the problem. It's just your feet.

line.stage: Jake walks over to Finn's feet and takes his shoes off

line.dialogue: Manually moving Finn's feet forward one at a time Boop. Beep. Boop. Beep. Boop. Beep. Boop. Beep. Beep. Boop. Beep. Boop.
Don't be scared. I shall not be scared.
Still moving Finn's feet Boop. Boop.

line.stage: The water touches Finn's feet

line.dialogue: I'm afraid! Ah! Jumps on top of Jake and starts punching him Jake, get me out of the water! Now, Jake! Now! Now!

line.stage: Jake inflates his head and walks Finn back to shore

line.dialogue: Hot jam! You're really scared of the ocean. In fact, you're so scared... it gives me an idea. Let's start a business of being scared of the ocean!
Jake!
Ok. Ok. I have a plan to get rid of your fear. We'll start tomorrow morning.
But I must conquer this now! Runs towards the ocean screaming I'm not afraid of you!

line.stage: Multiple waves crash directly in front of Finn in rapid succession and a single droplet hits Finn's face

line.dialogue: reels back in slow-motion and screams No!
Running backwards I'm afraid of you! I'm afraid of you! Screams
Exhaustedly crawls to Jake's feet Ok, yeah. Let's try tomorrow.

line.stage: The scene changes to Finn and Jake's bedroom where Jake is sitting on top of a sleeping Finn

line.dialogue: Fiiiinn. Finn. Hey, Finn. Wake up.
Opens his eyes Morning, Jake.
Ready for me to help you get over your ocean fear?
Yeah, man.
Cool... but I can only do this if you ask me.
I'm askin'!
Then get ready for my three-step plan. Watch your troubles melt away with step one!

line.stage: Jake punches the bedroom wall and the entire structure breaks apart, leaving Finn and Jake floating on Finn's bed in the middle of the ocean

line.dialogue: Screams Jake, are you crazy? This is not an OK thing to do!
Hey. Hey. Come on. The ocean is your friend, and you got friends all around you right now. Miles and miles of friends.
You're nuts. Wriggles from side to side
Don't try to struggle, man. Pulls the blankets back, revealing that Finn is tied to the bed I'll let you out in a second. You just need to calm down.
Really? Ok. I'm calming down.
That's great. You're doing great. Ready for step two?
Breathing heavily Yeah, man. I can do it.
Alright, dude. Step... two! Unties the rope

line.stage: The bed collapses and falls into the ocean, leaving Finn floating inside his sleeping bag and Jake on top of him

line.dialogue: Screams Jake, this isn't a joke! It's touching me!
Let it hold you, man! Let it hold you like a child!
Heart pounding I'm trying to let it hold me.
Control your breathing!
Breathes in and out This isn't working!
That means we gotta move to step three. Just don't scream.
W-what?
I'm gonna push you underwater with my jowls. Just don't scream. Don't scream.

line.stage: Jake pushes Finn's head underwater

line.dialogue: What?!
Don't scream. Hold your breath, Finn. You got it, dude!

line.stage: Finn screams and bursts out of his sleeping bag, sending Jake flying into the water
Finn jumps onto Jake's head and starts pounding on him

line.dialogue: Get me away, Jake! Now, Jake! Now! Right now! Get-Get me away! Screams
Finn! Stop it, Finn! Ow!

line.stage: Finn grabs Jake's ears and stretches them until they catch wind and carry both Finn and Jake to an island of pre-war ruins

line.dialogue: Laughs I'm safe! I'm safe! How'd I do?
I think we should give up.
What? I made it all the way to level three.

Look, Finn. It's not that I don't want to help you... I just don't wanna get beat up anymore. I mean this Pointing to his face is my bread and butter. I can't have you messing up my bread and butter, dude.
You have to help me. I can't do this without you.
Ok. Fine... but only if you swear not to hit me anymore.
I swear I won't hit you anymore.
And also swear to only speak in rhymes. Speak in rhymes all the times.
I swear... and pigs have hair.
Yes. Perfect. And since you want more... it's time for step four.
What? I thought you said it was a three step plan... man.
I'm not that good at counting. Laughs and grabs a small, rusty submarine Come on. Let's go kick your fear of the ocean where the sun don't shine... in the sea cucumber.

line.stage: The scene changes to underwater where Finn and Jake are heading to the ocean floor in the submarine

line.dialogue: Check it, dude. One hundred percent awesome-itude.
Eyes closed, breathes heavily and shivers Yeah. It's pretty math... you psychopath.
You know, it looks way more math if you open up your eyes.
Opens his eyes Whoa...
See, man? The ocean is beautiful. There's no reason to be afraid of things that are beautiful.
Hey. This isn't that bad. I'm actually glad.
Points Hey, look! A black abyss! Let's go check it out... sauerkraut.
No, Jake! Turn around! Turn around!

line.stage: Finn sees the Fear Feaster's face appear in front of the abyss

line.dialogue: Noooo!
Saying, "Turn around" twice doesn't count as a rhyme, dude.

line.stage: Finn pushes Jake away from the submarine controls

line.dialogue: Hey, you swore!

line.stage: Finn pummels Jake

line.dialogue: Ow! My bread and butter!

line.stage: Finn grabs the controls and jerks them violently

line.dialogue: No, dude! Don't!

line.stage: The submarine moves wildly and launches torpedoes, one of which hits a building
The building topples and hits the submarine, causing it to start filling up with water

line.dialogue: Don't worry, dude. Everything's cool. This is the perfect segue into level five. Handing Finn a dive suit Here, put this on.

line.stage: Finn starts putting on the suit

line.dialogue: Just make sure you don't pull the emergency tab.

line.stage: Finn pulls the emergency tab

line.dialogue: No, dude! I said don't...

line.stage: Finn's suit expands rapidly and knocks Jake back, hitting his head against a valve and knocking him out
Finn floats to the surface and watches Jake descend into the abyss along with the broken submarine

line.dialogue: Jake? Jaaaaaake!

line.stage: Finn reaches the surface and jumps onto a buoy

line.dialogue: Jake!
Laughs Pathetic! You can't even overcome your fear now that your friend is about to die! Your un-heroic body will never let you save Jake. Laughs
Sadly You're right.
What? Really? You think I'm right? Well, that's... that's great!
Holding a wrench If my body won't let me rescue my best friend, then there's only one thing left to do.

line.stage: Finn removes his helmet, hits himself on the head with the wrench and falls into the ocean

line.dialogue: No. Wait. No! Noooo!

line.stage: Finn lands on the ocean floor and wakes up next to Jake
Jake groans

line.dialogue: Jake! Jake! Wake up!

line.stage: Jake opens his eyes

line.dialogue: You ok, dude?
Yeah, man. Wait... Finn, you did it! You conquered your fear!
What?
You're at the bottom of the ocean!

line.stage: Finn screams and tries to pull his emergency tab, but nothing happens

line.dialogue: Maybe we should celebrate on land.

line.stage: Jake grabs Finn and pulls his own emergency tab, so they both float to the surface
Finn and Jake run onto the beach and fall backwards

line.dialogue: I'm proud of you man. You did it!
Thanks, dude.

line.stage: Fear Feaster comes out of Finn's navel

line.dialogue: You've nothing to be proud of, boy! You will never get of your fear of the ocean!
Whoa, dude! What's with your bellybutton?
To Fear Feaster What the flip, man? I just swam to the bottom!
No you didn't, cheater! You just sank to the bottom. You will never be a great hero.
He's right. I'll never be a hero.

line.stage: Finn's stomach rumbles and a black-smoke limousine comes out of him and parks nearby
The limousine’s windows roll down and Three Wise Men come out

line.dialogue: Finn, you are wrong. The mark of a great hero is his flaw.
You know nothing, Wise Men!
Silence, Fear Feaster! We know a lot!
Wait... Why did you wait so long to tell me?
Because the limo driver's flaw is being late!
Sorry. rolls up window
Farewell, Finn. You truly are the greatest hero of Ooo.

line.stage: The Wise Men go back inside the limo and then the limo drives back into Finn

line.dialogue: It's time for you to go away, Fear Feaster!
What? Am I supposed to live in your tummy for the rest of my life?
Everybody has a flaw... and it looks like yours is smelling like my nasty guts.

line.stage: Fear Feaster heads back into Finn's stomach

line.dialogue: Sarcastically Wonderful...
And so fear is forced deep within the soul of a hero. Conquered... at least, for now... Maniacal laugh
